info.title: Simbee API
info.description:
Simbee platform API — user graph, affinities, discovery, matching, scoring, campaigns, and feed management.

All requests require a Bearer JWT token obtained from the /auth/token endpoint using your API key.

get.description: List all campaigns with summary stats.
Detailed analytics for a single campaign.
Aggregates all user data across services for GDPR data portability

delete.description: Permanently deletes all user data across all services (irreversible)

get.summary: List active consents for a user
List available preset layers and their options
Get tunable parameter schema with bounds, types, and descriptions
Get ranked discovery feed for user

post.description: Authenticate with user credentials and get a JWT token
